steps.t: Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should enter the Haradrim camp at Harlanc.
Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should destroy Haradrim supplies in Harlanc and search for other ways to disrupt their operations there.
Thurindol can be found in the keep at Bâr Húrin. You should talk to Thurindol.
